name: Philly Free 3-step Cheesecake Flavor Variatio
recipeInstructions:
1. Pumpkin: Mix 3/4 cup canned pumpkin, 3/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon, and a dash of each ground cloves and nutmeg with the cheese. Omit fruit.
2. Cherry: Top with 1 (20 oz.) can reduced calorie cherry pie filling before serving.
3. Quick Crust: Substitute 1 (9oz) ready-to-use graham cracker crumb crust (extra serving size) for crumbs (makes 12 servings). Add 5g fat/serving.
4. Honey Crunch: Omit sugar, mix 1/2 cup honey in with the cream cheese. Omit fruit. Top with 3/4 cup low-fat granola cereal; drizzle with 1 tablespoon honey before serving.
